system.powerDescription:
With a touch, you convert a target's flesh or an object of up to CAT size into one of the following materials: oil, gold, salt, or gemstone. If you use this power on a creature, roll PSYCHE and answer the following questions, gaining +1D for each 'yes' answer. 

• Are you willing to sacrifice your flesh? (Take 1d3 stress) 

• Are you willing to sacrifice your belongings? (Lose 1 KP). 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power.
